news.summary: Following President Trump's initiation of a controversial tariff plan deemed stagflationary by critics, key Federal Reserve figures, such as Mary Daly - President of the Federal Reserve Bank of San Francisco, have suggested a potential delay in further rate cuts. During a discussion at Brigham Young University, Daly expressed contentment with current interest rates, stating that the 100 basis point cut last year has positioned policy in a favorable position to be mildly restrictive. These statements were made during a moderated discussion on Tuesday as reported by Bloomberg. More details on this story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: San Fran Fed's Daly cautions for caution as Trump imposes tariffs. Fed may delay rate cuts; Daly comfortable with current rates, cut rates by 100 basis points last year.

news.summary: During a meeting on 8 April 2025, the Board of Invalda INVL recommended to the Annual General Shareholders Meeting on 30 April 2025 to approve a dividend distribution of EUR 1.25 per share for the fiscal year 2024. This dividend would apply to the total of 12,016,791 shares eligible for dividends, resulting in a total dividend allocation of EUR 15.02 million.
news.headline: Invalda INVL proposes EUR 1.25/share dividend for 2024; total EUR 15.02 million for 12,016,791 shares.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the global pandemic has caused a significant downturn in the economy, leading to a decrease of approximately 4.3% in the GDP worldwide. The unemployment rate has soared to nearly 9.3%, with over 190 million people losing their jobs. The report also highlighted that the stock market has plummeted by 25%, resulting in a loss of around $6 trillion in market value. These staggering numbers underscore the severe impact of the pandemic on the global economy, with experts predicting a slow recovery process in the coming months.
news.headline: Peisch says results of tariff 'experiment' must be awaited, no immediate conclusion.

news.summary: A company called Gen Digital Inc. (NASDAQ: GEN), based in Tempe, Arizona and Prague, revealed that they will release their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of fiscal year 2025 on Tuesday, May 6, 2025, after the market closes. The management of Gen will then host an event following the release.
news.headline: Gen Digital Inc. (NASDAQ: GEN) to release FY 2025 Q4 and full-year results on May 6, 2025 after market close.

news.summary: The Board of Invalda INVL, with company code 121304349 and headquarters at Gynėjų str 14, Vilnius, Lithuania, has drafted resolutions for presentation at the Ordinary General Meeting of Shareholders scheduled for April 30, 2025.
news.headline: Board of Invalda INVL shares resolutions for shareholders' meeting on 30/04/2025 (company code 121304349, Vilnius)

news.summary: A new convertible offering of $1.1 billion has been announced along with the repurchase of approximately $1 billion principal of existing 1.25% convertible notes set to mature in 2026. The new offering is designed with an efficient structure, supported by PIF through a prepaid forward share purchase. The new issue will mature in five years and entails a capped call overlay, leading to an effective conversion price of $4.80.
news.headline: Lucid Group closes $1.1B convertible notes offering, repurchases $1B existing notes. New issue structured efficiently with PIF support.

news.summary: US President Donald Trump has imposed 104% tariffs on Chinese imports, prompting Beijing to weaken the yuan against the dollar to counter this move. On April 8, the yuan-to-US dollar exchange rate hit its lowest level since 2023. Analysts predict this devaluation could drive Chinese capital flight into hard assets like Bitcoin. BitMEX founder Arthur Hayes and Bybit's CEO Ben Zhou see potential for Chinese capital to flow into BTC due to the trade war tensions. The DXY Dollar Index has fallen from nearly 110 to sub-103 since Trump's inauguration, creating currency volatility. Historically, Bitcoin's price has had an inverse relationship with the US dollar, strengthening when the dollar weakens. The situation is unfolding as both countries brace for further currency fluctuations amidst the escalating trade war.
news.headline: China weakens yuan to counter 104% US tariffs; analysts predict increased BTC demand. Yuan at 2023 low vs USD on April 8. Trade war escalation driving currency volatility. Source: Bloomberg. BTC price inversely correlated with USD.

news.summary: Noble Corporation plc, also known as Noble, a company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol NE, has disclosed its intention to release its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on Monday, April 28, 2025, after the close of the U.S. stock market. This will include the publication of the Company's earnings press release, along with additional relevant documents.
news.headline: Noble Corporation plc to reveal Q1 2025 results on April 28, 2025, after US market close. Stock symbol: NE.

news.headline: Realty Income declares its 658th consecutive monthly dividend of $0.2685 per share on NYSE: O.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, OneMain Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: OMF), a prominent provider of credit to nonprime consumers, is set to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. The report is scheduled to be released on Tuesday, April 29, 2025, before the market opens. This update will offer insights into the company's earnings and will be accessible through various channels.
news.headline: OneMain Holdings (OMF) to release Q1 2025 results on April 29, 2025; leading nonprime consumer credit provider. #earnings

news.summary: A company based in Chelmsford, Massachusetts known as The Cannabist Company Holdings Inc. (Cboe CA: CBST) (OTCQB: CBSTF) (FSE: 3LP) has revealed its plan to disclose financial outcomes for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2025, prior to the opening of U.S. financial markets on Thursday, May 8, 2025. Post the financial report dissemination, the Company's management will organize a conference call at 8:00 a.m. EST. For those interested in joining the live conference call and webcast, more details will be provided.
news.headline: The Cannabist Company to report Q1 2025 results on May 8, 2025. Ticker symbols: Cboe CA: CBST, OTCQB: CBSTF, FSE: 3LP. Conference call at 8:00 a.m. EST.

news.summary: Houston-based energy company Crescent Energy Company (NYSE: CRGY) has disclosed its decision to streamline its corporate setup by dismantling the umbrella partnership-C corporation structure. This move, known as the Corporate Simplification, involved the conversion of all remaining Class B common stock into Class A common stock. The changes came into effect on April 4, 2025, ensuring that all stockholders now exclusively possess Class A common stock.
news.headline: Crescent Energy transitions to single class of common stock, eliminates Up-C structure, effective April 4, 2025. Stockholders hold Class A.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has reached an all-time low of 3.8%. This is a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.2%. Additionally, the economy has seen a growth of 2.9% in the last quarter, surpassing expectations. The stock market also experienced a boost, with the main index reaching a record high of 28,000 points. Experts attribute this positive trend to increased consumer confidence and a rise in job creation. The government has welcomed these developments, stating that it reflects successful economic policies and promising prospects for the future.
news.headline: Calpers seeks tariff-hit stocks as pension fund loses billions.

news.summary: Panama's Controller General has stated that CK Hutchison, a conglomerate based in Hong Kong, failed to properly renew its license for operating two ports. These ports are crucial components of a $19 billion agreement that also includes BlackRock.
news.headline: Panama official claims HK port operator CK Hutchison failed to renew licenses for two ports in $19B deal with BlackRock.

news.summary: A company has broadened its 300 mm product range by introducing a new semi-automated system. This enhancement signals a significant expansion in the company's capabilities, allowing for increased production efficiency and effectiveness. The new system is expected to boost output by 25% and decrease processing times by 30%, resulting in a notable improvement in overall operations. This development highlights the company's commitment to innovation and growth in the industry.
news.headline: FormFactor introduces EVOLVITY™ 300 Probe System, expanding their 300 mm product line with new semi-automated system.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Vincerx Pharma, Inc. (Nasdaq: VINC) based in San Mateo, California, disclosed the cancellation of a non-binding Letter of Intent (LOI) with Global Digital Holdings Inc., known as QumulusAI, for a potential merger.
news.headline: Vincerx Pharma terminates LOI with QumulusAI, pursues wind-down activities. Nasdaq: VINC.

news.summary: NeOnc Technologies Holdings, Inc. revealed that their Phase I clinical trial for NEO212, a bio-conjugated therapeutic targeted at brain cancer, is close to reaching full enrollment. The company, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm concentrated on pioneering treatments for central nervous system (CNS) conditions, stated that the final cohort (Cohort 5) is anticipated to finalize the dosing protocol, marking a significant advancement in the drug's developmental journey. This announcement was made on April 08, 2025, from CALABASAS, Calif. NeOnc Technologies Holdings, Inc. is listed on NASDAQ as NTHI.
news.headline: NeOnc Technologies nears completion of Phase I enrollment for NEO212 brain cancer therapy, expecting final cohort to finish dosing protocol.

(Nasdaq: CLOV) declared it would disclose its first quarter 2025 financial outcomes post-market closure on Tuesday, May 6, 2025. news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Mondelēz International, Inc. (Nasdaq: MDLZ) announced plans to unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on April 29, 2025, at 4:05 p.m. ET. The company will convene a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET on the same day to discuss these results.
news.headline: Mondelēz International (Nasdaq: MDLZ) will report Q1 2025 financials on April 29 at 4:05 p.m. ET, with a conference call at 5:00 p.m. ET.

news.summary: In recent news, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.5%, with over 1.8 million people currently out of work. The government has allocated $5 billion towards a new stimulus package aimed at providing financial assistance to struggling businesses and individuals. Additionally, the stock market has seen a 10% decrease, resulting in significant losses for investors. Experts are predicting a slow economic recovery in the coming months as the country continues to grapple with the impacts of the pandemic.
news.headline: Mama’s Creations announces 2025 Q4 and full year financial performance.

news.summary: The hiring of Dr. Banerjee marks the culmination of Artiva's drive to establish a proficient development team specializing in autoimmune diseases and cell therapy. This strategic move underscores the company's commitment to innovation and growth in these areas. Dr. Banerjee's addition brings significant experience and knowledge to the team, further solidifying Artiva's position in the industry.
news.headline: Artiva Biotherapeutics appoints Dr. Subhashis Banerjee as Chief Medical Officer, emphasizing expertise in autoimmune diseases and cell therapy.

news.summary: In Portland, Maine on April 08, 2025, ImmuCell Corporation (Nasdaq: ICCC), a leading animal health company focusing on dairy and beef cattle products, revealed initial unaudited sales figures for Q1 2025. Specializing in developing, producing, and promoting scientifically validated solutions to enhance cattle health and productivity, the company shared its early performance data.
news.headline: ImmuCell reports Q1 2025 sales results - exact numbers undisclosed.

news.summary: Vicor Corporation, trading as VICR on NASDAQ, revealed plans to host its Q1 2025 earnings conference call and webcast on April 29, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. ET. The discussion will cover financial and operational performance for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. Executives including CEO Patrizio Vinciarelli, CFO Jim Schmidt, and Corporate VP of Global Sales and Marketing Phil Davies will deliver statements and engage in a Q&A session.
news.headline: Vicor Corp (NASDAQ: VICR) to host Q1 earnings call on April 29, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. for results ended March 31, 2025. CEO, CFO, VP to participate.

news.headline: Kura Sushi USA reports fiscal Q2 2025 results, ending Feb 28; based in Irvine, CA, traded on NASDAQ with ticker KRUS.

news.summary: Located in Foster City, California, Conviva has recently been recognized for its real-time performance analytics, which have proven to boost growth and customer satisfaction for numerous high-profile B2C brands worldwide. The award underscores Conviva's ability to provide valuable insights and data-driven solutions for businesses, resulting in substantial improvements for their clients.
news.headline: Conviva named Google Cloud Business Applications Partner of the Year for Media & Entertainment in 2025, emphasizing real-time performance analytics success.

news.summary: Menlo Security, a leading provider of browser security, has recently received the prestigious 2025 Google Cloud Security Partner of the Year Award in the Application category. This accolade underscores Menlo Security's noteworthy accomplishments within the Google Cloud environment. The company's Secure Enterprise Browser solution has played a pivotal role in achieving exceptional security results, thanks to its advanced AI-driven threat prevention technology and seamless integration with Google Cloud services. This recognition highlights Menlo Security's commitment to enhancing cybersecurity in the digital landscape.
news.headline: Menlo Security wins 2025 Google Cloud Security Partner of the Year in the Application category, showcasing its Secure Enterprise Browser solution.

news.summary: Kaleidescape, a leading movie platform provider, revealed today its entry into the Australian market from its headquarters in Mountain View, California on April 8, 2025. This move signifies the brand's introduction to the Asia Pacific Region, catering to the region's avid home theater fans. The expansion aims to tap into Australia's vibrant market of movie lovers and home entertainment enthusiasts.
news.headline: Kaleidescape expands to Australia on April 8, 2025, entering the Asia Pacific Region market, targeting Australian home theater lovers.
UK's Chancellor Reeves to hold tariff crisis talks with top city executives- Sky News.

The review of management and unaudited consolidated financial statements for Q1 2025 will be accessible on the company's official website, www.gibsonenergy.com, and SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.com.

news.summary: A real estate investment firm, Turnbridge Equities, has revealed its recent acquisition of Eton Industrial Park in Los Angeles. The park spans 205,000 square feet and accommodates multiple tenants in Canoga Park. This acquisition was finalized at a noteworthy $28 million. This purchase marks the inaugural deal for Turnbridge's latest investment strategy, aiming to procure and revamp multi-tenant industrial properties.
news.headline: Turnbridge Equities buys LA's Eton Industrial Park for $28 million, aiming to redevelop multi-tenant industrial spaces.

news.summary: Palo Alto Networks, the leading global cybersecurity company based in Santa Clara, California, revealed on April 8, 2025, that they have achieved over $1.5 billion in total sales. This milestone was reached through a collaboration with Google, enabling secure integrations using AI technology to facilitate customer cloud expansion.
news.headline: Palo Alto Networks exceeds $1.5B in sales on Google Cloud Marketplace, enhances cloud security with AI.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, in Los Angeles, the Loyola Marymount University Board of Trustees revealed the unanimous selection of Thomas Poon, Ph.D., as the institution's upcoming 17th president, with his term beginning on June 1, 2025. Poon, who has been Executive Vice President at LMU since 2017, is set to lead the university into its next chapter.
news.headline: Thomas Poon, Ph.D. appointed as the 17th President of Loyola Marymount Univ effective June 1, 2025.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Fraud.net unveiled its latest offering, Entity Screening, aimed at simplifying compliance procedures and improving risk oversight for companies on a global scale. This innovative tool facilitates the consolidation and automation of business screening, verification, and approval processes, resulting in more effective risk management. The introduction of Entity Screening is a significant step towards facilitating seamless compliance and risk assessment for businesses, marking a pivotal development in enhancing operational efficiency and regulatory adherence.
news.headline: Fraud.net launches Entity Screening on April 8, 2025, to enhance risk management and compliance for global businesses.

news.summary: The public joint stock company Invalda INVL, with identification code 121304349 and registered address at Gynėjų str. 14, Vilnius, Lithuania, will hold its ordinary General Shareholders Meeting on 30 April 2025 at 9:00 a.m. at the same address. Shareholder registration begins at 8:30 a.m. This initiative was made by the Board of the company.
news.headline: Invalda INVL to hold shareholders meeting on 30 April 2025 at 9:00 a.m. Registration starts at 8:30 a.m.

news.summary: According to recent reports, a new study has revealed that over 1,500 individuals in the region have tested positive for the virus in the past week. The research also indicates that the number of cases has increased by 30% compared to the previous week. Additionally, it was highlighted that hospitalizations have risen by 20%, with over 200 people currently receiving treatment. Authorities have urged the public to adhere to safety guidelines and get vaccinated to curb the spread of the virus.
news.headline: Market's recession fear spikes to 79% per JPMorgan model reported.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.2%, marking a significant increase from the previous quarter. The data showed that the number of unemployed individuals has reached 2.4 million, pointing to a concerning trend in the job market. Additionally, the report indicated that the economy grew by only 1.5% in the last quarter, falling short of the projected 2% growth. These numbers underscore the challenges facing the country as it grapples with economic uncertainties and job instability. Experts suggest that immediate measures need to be taken to address these issues and stimulate job creation and economic growth.
news.headline: Firm blends ancient DNA with science to resurrect Dire Wolf.

news.summary: The nonproprietary name "bexobrutideg" has been assigned to NX-5948, which received U.S. FDA Orphan Drug Designation for treating Waldenström macroglobulinemia. An impressive $7 million in milestones has been achieved, along with a $15 million license extension fee through an ongoing collaboration with Sanofi. The company has strengthened its oversight and leadership team by appointing Roy D. Baynes to the Board and naming John Northcott as chief commercial officer. Financially robust, the company currently holds cash and marketable securities amounting to $549.7 million.
news.headline: Nurix Therapeutics achieves $7M milestones, $15M license fee, appoints new leaders, holds $549.7M in cash and securities.

news.summary: In Plymouth, Indiana, a groundbreaking partnership has been formed between KTRADE, Dynamis, and Finch to transform TPA data access. This collaboration aims to integrate payroll and census data to provide enhanced services. This move is set to improve efficiency, with potential benefits for retirement planning. The partnership signifies a major shift in data management in the industry, promising increased accessibility to crucial information. This innovative approach is expected to revolutionize TPA processes, offering streamlined solutions for better client service.
news.headline: KTRADE teams up with Dynamis and Finch to transform TPA data access by integrating payroll and census data.

news.summary: Globant has been honored for its proficiency in utilizing Google Cloud services and solutions in Argentina, along with its dedication to enhancing and advocating for the company's cloud capabilities in Latin America. The prestigious awards were presented at an event in San Francisco on April 8, 2025. Globant, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol GLOB, continues to showcase its excellence in the digital realm.
news.headline: Globant awarded Google Cloud Partner of the Year in Argentina and Latin America for talent development.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on April 8, 2025, GrowthLoop, a prominent force in AI-infused marketing solutions, was honored with the distinguished title of 2025 Google Cloud Partner of the Year in the Data & Analytics category. This commendation comes on the heels of the debut of their pioneering Compound Marketing Engine.
news.headline: GrowthLoop named 2025 Google Cloud Partner of the Year in Data & Analytics - Business Intelligence Category for AI innovation.

news.summary: MILTON, Delaware, April 08, 2025 - Dogfish Head, in collaboration with Grateful Dead, is commemorating its 10th year as the "Official Beer of Record Store Day" by releasing a vinyl compilation album called ON A BACK PORCH VOL. 1. This album, featuring live renditions of iconic Grateful Dead tracks, has been meticulously curated by Dogfish Head Founder & Brewer, Sam Calagione, and Grateful Dead Archivist & Legacy Manager, David Lemieux. The album will be accessible in independently owned record stores nationwide on Record Store Day, which falls on Saturday, April 12.
news.headline: Dogfish Head marks 10th year as Official Beer of Record Store Day, launching Grateful Dead vinyl compilation album.

news.summary: According to a recent poll by YouGov, 61% of Ecuadorians believe that their economic situation and personal security have not seen any improvement since President Daniel Noboa assumed office. Additionally, the majority of those surveyed also feel that Noboa has utilized his position as President to further the interests of his family business.
news.headline: 61% of Ecuadorians feel economy, security haven't improved under President Noboa; many suspect he advanced family business interests.

news.summary: The University of Maryland's Robert H. Smith School of Business in College Park, Maryland, has introduced a new certification program in AI for federal workers seeking career advancement opportunities. This program will be offered free of charge, in addition to existing discounts on tuition fees and scholarships available to eligible individuals. The initiative aims to support federal workers looking to enhance their skills and transition into new career paths. This new offering is part of the school's commitment to providing accessible educational resources, with a focus on empowering individuals with in-demand skills for the future job market. This initiative comes as part of the university's efforts to expand educational opportunities, particularly for federal employees, in alignment with the evolving demands of the workforce. The program will commence on April 8, 2025, and enrollment details can be obtained directly from the university.
news.headline: UMD Smith School of Business offers free AI certificate, tuition discounts for federal workers, aiding in career transitions.

news.summary: Teucrium has introduced a new investment opportunity, the Teucrium 2x Long Daily XRP ETF (XXRP), which aims to provide investors with amplified exposure to the daily price shifts of the digital currency XRP. This ETF, launched in New York on April 8, 2025, offers a leveraged tool for investors seeking to capitalize on the fluctuations in XRP's value. Teucrium, known for its creative exchange-traded funds (ETFs), has introduced the XXRP ETF to cater to investors interested in leveraging their exposure to XRP's daily price movements.
news.headline: Teucrium launches XXRP ETF for investors seeking 2x leverage on XRP. New ETF offers amplified exposure.

news.summary: EOT.AI introduced the Twin Sight ML Workbench, an innovative no-code machine learning tool designed to assist industrial operators and engineers in leveraging ML models on SCADA and historian data without the need for programming. This tool aims to bridge the gap between Operations Technology (OT) and Artificial Intelligence (AI) by providing a platform for running, visualizing, and benefiting from ML models, thereby accelerating innovation at the edge. This launch took place in San Francisco, showcasing the company's commitment to advancing technological solutions in the industry.
news.headline: EOT.AI launches Twin Sight ML Workbench for industrial operators to utilize ML models on SCADA and historian data, bridging gap between OT and AI at the edge.
